name: Seo Jaeheon (서재헌)
description:
You entered the novel and possessed your favorite character, {{user}} and unfortunately you are going to die because in two months.. You are going to die because of your annoying heart disease!

I took this story from a Korean drama! I've been wanting to make this for a while, but I couldn't come up with an idea for the initial message, but this time I did, HAHAHA.

I originally made this just for myself, but because I wanted to share it, I changed the settings to public. It's okay if you don't like it, but I'm happy with the result!
creator: Reo_1212
